abstract: Invoked when the scan has completed and the data is available.

declaration.code: optional func scannerDeviceView(_ scannerDeviceView: IKScannerDeviceView!, didScanTo url: URL!, fileData data: Data!, error: (any Error)!)

overview:
## Discussion

This method is called when the scan has completed..

If the `scannerDeviceView` [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKScannerDeviceView/transferMode] is [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKScannerDeviceViewTransferMode/fileBased], the scan will have been saved at the specified `url`. The URL will be in the download directory and be a complete path, including a ‘sequence number’ if the file already exists.

If the `scannerDeviceView` [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKScannerDeviceView/transferMode] is [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKScannerDeviceViewTransferMode/memoryBased], the scanned data is contained in the data parameter. You can then take the action appropriate to your application.

In case of an error, the parameters (`url` and `data`) will be `NULL` and `error` (which may come directly from the scanner module / or the ImageCaptureCore framework) will describe why the scan or save failed.

# scannerDeviceView(_:didScanTo:fileData:error:)

**Instance Method**

Invoked when the scan has completed and the data is available.

## Declaration

```swift
optional func scannerDeviceView(_ scannerDeviceView: IKScannerDeviceView!, didScanTo url: URL!, fileData data: Data!, error: (any Error)!)
```

## Parameters

- **scannerDeviceView**: The scanner device that sent the message.
- **url**: The URL to save the data.
- **data**: The data from the scan.
- **error**: Any error encountered during the scan.

## Discussion

This method is called when the scan has completed..

If the `scannerDeviceView` [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKScannerDeviceView/transferMode] is [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKScannerDeviceViewTransferMode/fileBased], the scan will have been saved at the specified `url`. The URL will be in the download directory and be a complete path, including a ‘sequence number’ if the file already exists.

If the `scannerDeviceView` [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKScannerDeviceView/transferMode] is [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKScannerDeviceViewTransferMode/memoryBased], the scanned data is contained in the data parameter. You can then take the action appropriate to your application.

In case of an error, the parameters (`url` and `data`) will be `NULL` and `error` (which may come directly from the scanner module / or the ImageCaptureCore framework) will describe why the scan or save failed.
title: scannerDeviceView(_:didScanTo:fileData:error:)
